title: ononis hispanica subsp. ramosissima
intro: Ononis hispanica subsp. ramosissima, also known as Spanish broom or ramosissima Spanish broom, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Ononis hispanica subsp. ramosissima is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
